requirement_topic.en: Battery-Specific Regulation — No EU-Style Battery Law; SON Standards and Environmental Rules Apply
requirement_topic.zh: 电池专项法规——无欧盟式电池法；适用SON标准及环境规则
requirement_topic.zht: 電池專項法規——無歐盟式電池法；適用SON標準及環境規則

summary.en: Nigeria has no single comprehensive battery regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542. There is no Nigerian battery passport, no mandatory carbon footprint declaration for batteries, no recycled-content threshold, and no critical-mineral supply-chain due diligence law imposed on battery exporters. Instead, lithium batteries and power banks are governed by mandatory product certification under the SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP) administered by the Standards Organisation of Nigeria, on the basis of adopted Nigerian Industrial Standards (NIS) that reference the IEC 62133 series. Environmental and end-of-life handling is addressed at a general level by the National Environmental Standards and Regulations Enforcement Agency (NESREA) under its electrical/electronic and hazardous-waste regulations, not by a battery-specific producer-responsibility statute. There is therefore no labelling regime comparable to the EU QR-code battery passport or carbon footprint label; the operative compliance instrument is the SONCAP Product Certificate plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate issued before goods clear Nigerian customs.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚没有等同于欧盟电池法规2023/1542的单一综合性电池法规。尼日利亚没有电池护照、没有针对电池的强制碳足迹声明、没有再生材料含量门槛，也没有对电池出口商施加的关键矿产供应链尽职调查法律。锂电池及移动电源转而由尼日利亚标准组织（SON）管理的SON合格评定计划（SONCAP）下的强制产品认证约束，认证基准为采用并引用IEC 62133系列的尼日利亚工业标准（NIS）。环境及报废处理由国家环境标准与法规执行局（NESREA）依据其电气电子及危险废物法规作一般性规范，而非由电池专项的生产者责任法律规定。因此不存在类似欧盟二维码电池护照或碳足迹标签的标注制度；可操作的合规工具是货物在尼日利亚清关前签发的SONCAP产品证书加每批次SONCAP证书。
summary.zht: 奈及利亞沒有等同於歐盟電池法規2023/1542的單一綜合性電池法規。奈及利亞沒有電池護照、沒有針對電池的強制碳足跡聲明、沒有再生材料含量門檻，也沒有對電池出口商施加的關鍵礦產供應鏈盡職調查法律。鋰電池及行動電源轉而由奈及利亞標準組織（SON）管理的SON合格評定計劃（SONCAP）下的強制產品認證約束，認證基準為採用並引用IEC 62133系列的奈及利亞工業標準（NIS）。環境及報廢處理由國家環境標準與法規執行局（NESREA）依據其電氣電子及危險廢物法規作一般性規範，而非由電池專項的生產者責任法律規定。因此不存在類似歐盟二維碼電池護照或碳足跡標籤的標注制度；可操作的合規工具是貨物在奈及利亞清關前簽發的SONCAP產品證書加每批次SONCAP證書。

standards_or_laws: Standards Organisation of Nigeria Act, 2015 — legal basis for SON standards and the SONCAP scheme
SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP) — mandatory product certification for regulated/HS-listed products including batteries and power banks
National Environmental (Electrical/Electronic Sector) Regulations and NESREA Act, 2007 — general environmental and e-waste handling (not a battery-specific producer-responsibility statute)

summary.en: China likewise has no single comprehensive battery regulation equivalent to the EU framework. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety) and customs export declaration; certain rechargeable battery products fall under mandatory CCC certification per the CNCA catalogue. China operates a domestic producer-responsibility and recycling regime under the Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law and the 2021 battery recycling management measures, applicable inside China, but there is no Chinese battery passport, carbon footprint declaration framework, or critical-mineral due diligence obligation imposed on exporters. Neither the Chinese nor the Nigerian system imposes an EU-style battery passport or carbon footprint label.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有等同于欧盟框架的单一综合性电池法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）及海关出口申报约束；部分可充电电池产品依据CNCA目录须取得强制性CCC认证。中国在国内依据《固体废物污染环境防治法》及2021年废旧电池回收管理办法实行生产者责任与回收制度，但没有中国电池护照、碳足迹声明框架，也未对出口商施加关键矿产尽职调查义务。中国与尼日利亚制度均不施加欧盟式电池护照或碳足迹标签。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有等同於歐盟框架的單一綜合性電池法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）及海關出口申報約束；部分可充電電池產品依據CNCA目錄須取得強制性CCC認證。中國在國內依據《固體廢物污染環境防治法》及2021年廢舊電池回收管理辦法實行生產者責任與回收制度，但沒有中國電池護照、碳足跡聲明框架，也未對出口商施加關鍵礦產盡職調查義務。中國與奈及利亞制度均不施加歐盟式電池護照或碳足跡標籤。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) — domestic producer-responsibility framework
MIIT/NDRC battery recycling management measures (2021) — domestic recycling obligations

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Nigeria imposes no battery passport, no carbon footprint declaration, no recycled-content threshold, and no critical-mineral due diligence on battery exporters — so those EU-specific obligations do not transfer here. The Nigerian gap is different in kind: the operative requirement is mandatory SONCAP certification before shipment. A Chinese exporter who holds only a GB 31241 report has no Nigerian market access, because (1) a SONCAP Product Certificate must be issued against NIS/IEC 62133 evidence, and (2) a separate SONCAP Certificate must be obtained for each individual shipment prior to arrival, failing which the consignment cannot clear customs. NESREA e-waste duties apply at a general environmental level but are not a substitute for SONCAP and are not exporter-facing certification.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，尼日利亚不对电池出口商施加电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或关键矿产尽职调查——因此这些欧盟特有义务不适用于此。尼日利亚的差距性质不同：可操作要求是出货前的强制SONCAP认证。仅持有GB 31241报告的中国出口商不具备尼日利亚市场准入，因为（1）SONCAP产品证书须基于NIS/IEC 62133证据签发，且（2）须在每一批货物到港前单独取得SONCAP证书，否则货物无法清关。NESREA电子废物义务在一般环境层面适用，但不能替代SONCAP，亦非面向出口商的认证。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，奈及利亞不對電池出口商施加電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或關鍵礦產盡職調查——因此這些歐盟特有義務不適用於此。奈及利亞的差距性質不同：可操作要求是出貨前的強制SONCAP認證。僅持有GB 31241報告的中國出口商不具備奈及利亞市場准入，因為（1）SONCAP產品證書須基於NIS/IEC 62133證據簽發，且（2）須在每一批貨物到港前單獨取得SONCAP證書，否則貨物無法清關。NESREA電子廢物義務在一般環境層面適用，但不能替代SONCAP，亦非面向出口商的認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory product certification applies — SONCAP (Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate) is mandatory before customs clearance; however, there is no EU-style battery passport, carbon footprint, or critical-mineral due diligence obligation under Nigerian law
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — GB 31241 safety compliance and customs declaration are domestic export requirements; no battery passport, carbon footprint, or critical-mineral due diligence law applies to Chinese exporters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nigeria has no EU-style comprehensive battery regulation; mapping the EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 honestly, none of its passport, carbon footprint, recycled-content, or supply-chain due diligence obligations exist under Nigerian law. The operative Nigerian requirement is mandatory SONCAP certification (Product Certificate plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate) on a NIS/IEC 62133 basis, administered by the Standards Organisation of Nigeria, plus general NESREA environmental/e-waste handling. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification does not satisfy SONCAP and does not by itself grant Nigerian market access.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼日利亚没有欧盟式的综合性电池法规；如实映射欧盟电池法规2023/1542，其护照、碳足迹、再生材料含量或供应链尽职调查义务在尼日利亚法律下均不存在。尼日利亚可操作的要求是由尼日利亚标准组织管理、基于NIS/IEC 62133的强制SONCAP认证（产品证书加每批次SONCAP证书），以及NESREA的一般环境/电子废物处理。中国GB 31241或CCC认证不能满足SONCAP，本身也不授予尼日利亚市场准入。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 奈及利亞沒有歐盟式的綜合性電池法規；如實映射歐盟電池法規2023/1542，其護照、碳足跡、再生材料含量或供應鏈盡職調查義務在奈及利亞法律下均不存在。奈及利亞可操作的要求是由奈及利亞標準組織管理、基於NIS/IEC 62133的強制SONCAP認證（產品證書加每批次SONCAP證書），以及NESREA的一般環境/電子廢物處理。中國GB 31241或CCC認證不能滿足SONCAP，本身也不授予奈及利亞市場准入。

source.publisher: Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON) — SONCAP programme
